name: Starlair
short_description: Fly through an endless universe visiting the planets of other users and taking on their challenges in a Metroidvania style game!
detailed_description:
You've heard those stories about aliens invading Earth - but I bet you haven't heard the one where an entire galaxy of planets invades the universe. It's up to you - and a team of 50 bounty hunters to take down the evil space manipulator Zy and his seemingly endless alien hordes.

Starlair is a Metroidvania where the players create the worlds. You play as a bounty hunter traveling the galaxy looking for adventure - and riches. Every planet in the galaxy is created by another player. Either play or build - or both! It's up to you.

The world creator allows you to build your own Metroidvania style adventure game and then add it to the co-operative story mode that will challenge players.
